scenes.text:
You have been planning for months. Maybe
years. When does the doing start?

Analysis paralysis has killed more dreams than failure ever will. The person who takes imperfect action will always outrun the person still
perfecting their plan. Your brain is designed to keep you safe, not successful. It will always find a reason to wait.

The gap between where you are and where you want to be
is not knowledge. It is action. You already know enough to start.

Progress is not made in your head.
It is made with your hands.

Tag someone stuck in planning
mode. Follow for daily motivation.
